$comment: Worked example: 'New Balance' re-expressed as a Prism3 five-input brand. Generating this and diffing against the existing hand-built NB token set is the proposed regression test for the engine (see architecture spec §11.5). Values are illustrative OKLCH approximations of the current NB tokens, not yet engine-verified.

brand.name: New Balance
brand.voice: Athletic, confident, heritage-modern. Bold display, restrained UI.
